DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $301.30 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
